prompt: Create a cinematic wide 16:9 anime fantasy illustration of a joyful white-haired girl warrior riding one majestic feathered white griffin low over a sunlit alpine wildflower meadow. The composition has exactly two main subjects: 1 young female rider and 1 griffin mount. Show the griffin with an eagle-like head, sharp golden eye, white feathered body, long white tail, four legs, and exactly two enormous wings spread diagonally across the frame, with layered feathers catching warm sunlight. The rider has long flowing silver-white hair, a bright happy expression, light fantasy armor over a pale blue-and-white adventurer dress, small boots, gloves, and a short white cape or skirt fluttering behind her; she sits in a brown leather saddle with straps and small travel pouches, holding reins as if gliding just above the flowers. Set the scene in golden morning with a brilliant blue sky, soft cumulus clouds, distant rolling green-and-gold hills, hazy mountains, and a wide valley glowing in warm light. Fill the foreground with bright meadow grass and wildflowers, including white daisies, yellow blossoms, purple and blue flowers, with colorful windblown petals and loose white feathers swirling through the air to enhance speed and joy. Use a dynamic low-angle perspective from within the flowers, shallow depth of field on the nearest blossoms, strong rim lighting, luminous painterly detail, crisp anime character rendering, epic fantasy adventure mood, vibrant colors, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic wide 16:9 anime fantasy illustration of a joyful white-haired girl warrior riding one majestic feathered white griffin low over a sunlit alpine wildflower meadow. The composition has exactly two main subjects: 1 young female rider and 1 griffin mount. Show the griffin with an eagle-like head, sharp golden eye, white feathered body, long white tail, four legs, and exactly two enormous wings spread diagonally across the frame, with layered feathers catching warm sunlight. The rider has long flowing silver-white hair, a bright happy expression, light fantasy armor over a pale blue-and-white adventurer dress, small boots, gloves, and a short white cape or skirt fluttering behind her; she sits in a brown leather saddle with straps and small travel pouches, holding reins as if gliding just above the flowers. Set the scene in golden morning with a brilliant blue sky, soft cumulus clouds, distant rolling green-and-gold hills, hazy mountains, and a wide valley glowing in warm light. Fill the foreground with bright meadow grass and wildflowers, including white daisies, yellow blossoms, purple and blue flowers, with colorful windblown petals and loose white feathers swirling through the air to enhance speed and joy. Use a dynamic low-angle perspective from within the flowers, shallow depth of field on the nearest blossoms, strong rim lighting, luminous painterly detail, crisp anime character rendering, epic fantasy adventure mood, vibrant colors, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一幅 16:9 电影感宽画幅的动漫奇幻插画，描绘 一位快乐的白发女战士 骑着一只雄伟的白色羽毛狮鹫，低空掠过阳光明媚的高山野花草甸。构图包含两个主要主体：1 位年轻女性骑手和 1 只狮鹫坐骑。狮鹫拥有鹰头、锐利的金色眼睛、白色羽毛覆盖的身体、长长的白色尾巴、四条腿，以及两只在画面中呈对角线展开的巨大翅膀，层叠的羽毛捕捉着温暖的阳光。骑手留着飘逸的 银白色 长发，表情明亮愉悦，身穿浅蓝色与白色相间的冒险家服饰，外罩轻便的奇幻盔甲，搭配小靴子、手套和随风飘动的白色短披风或短裙；她坐在带有皮带和小旅行袋的棕色皮鞍上，手握缰绳，仿佛正滑翔在花丛之上。场景设定在 金色的清晨，背景是湛蓝的天空、柔软的积云、远处起伏的绿金色丘陵、朦胧的山脉以及在暖光中熠熠生辉的广阔山谷。前景布满了明亮的草地和野花，包括雏菊、黄色花朵、紫色和蓝色的花卉，空气中飘散着色彩斑斓的花瓣和零星的白色羽毛，以增强速度感与愉悦感。采用从花丛中仰拍的动态低角度视角，最近处的花朵呈现浅景深效果，强烈的轮廓光，细腻的绘画质感，清晰的动漫角色渲染，史诗般的奇幻冒险氛围，色彩鲜艳，无文字，无水印。
